novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship headline promises a terminating exposed-sign elimination algorithm with dual certificates, but §9 only hand-computes small catalogues and does not run or specify the elimination/dual-certificate procedure; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The distortion pair compares q_A and q_agg globally on W, while the locked object is a scalar ATET interval depending on lambda; global norm non-exactness is not necessary for non-exactness of the lambda-support interval.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The finiteness/equality certificate for Delta_cons and Delta_anti needs an explicit shared-kernel or anchored-TV condition; otherwise directions with q_agg=0<q_A, or conversely, make the normalized sign LP catalogue miss infinite distortions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the global Delta pair with lambda-targeted distortions, e.g. support-ratio objects in directions ±lambda, or state explicitly that the theorem certifies equality of restriction balls rather than equality of the scalar ATET identified interval.

Add a real §9 algorithm exhibit: list the elimination rules, solve the sign-restricted LPs for one nontrivial signed A with at least three aggregate event times, and display the dual certificates for the surviving signs.
State a shared-kernel/anchoring assumption ensuring Delta_cons and Delta_anti are finite and that the ≤1 and =1 normalizations are equivalent for the sign-catalogue maxima.

To reach flagship, upgrade the result from exponential finite enumeration to a genuinely primitive certificate: polynomial-size active-face test, necessary-and-sufficient lambda-support frontier, or a generic open-class anti-conservative obstruction tied to Liu/Wright workflows.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 around a lambda-targeted, finite, exhibited certificate; without that repair the proposal remains a field-tier TV specialization of the banked quotient-support idea.
